full_text:
Yang Xi (Wenran) 楊戲 (文然)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Xi (楊戲), styledWenran (文然), was born in Wuyang county, Jianwei commandery. Respected for his honesty but was sacked and died a commoner. Yang Xi was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Yang Xi lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
